ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹At least˺ for ˹the favour of˺ making Quraysh habitually secure—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: secure in their trading caravan ˹to Yemen˺ in the winter and ˹Syria˺ in the summer—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: let them worship the Lord of this ˹Sacred˺ House,

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٖ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنۡ خَوۡفِۭ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allathee atAAamahum min jooAAin waamanahum min khawfin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Who has fed them against hunger and made them secure against fear.
